name: aiforsecurity-hub
description: AI 安全威胁知识库 — 涵盖 OpenClaw MAESTRO 威胁模型与 AI Agent 威胁模型，提供交互式安全威胁建模与防护剧本
author: y4ney

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.prebuild: node gen-index.mjs && rm -rf public/wiki && mkdir -p public/wiki && cp -r wiki/openclaw-threat-model public/wiki/openclaw-threat-model && cp -r wiki/ai-agent-threat-model public/wiki/ai-agent-threat-model
